## QUERY
What is the project structure and what technologies/frameworks are used? Is this a Godot project?

## SCOPE

## SCHEMA
```json
{"type":"object","properties":{"framework":{"type":"string"},"language":{"type":"string"},"key_files":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}}}}
```

## RESULT
**是的，这是一个 Godot 4.6 项目**，名为 "Multimodality Frame"，使用 C# (.NET 8.0) 作为主要编程语言，并集成了 Dialogue Manager 插件（GDScript 编写）。

```json
{
  "framework": "Godot 4.6 (Forward Plus renderer) with Dialogue Manager addon",
  "language": "C# (.NET 8.0, Godot.NET.Sdk 4.6.1) + GDScript (addon)",
  "key_files": [
    "project.godot",
    "Multimodality Frame.csproj",
    "Multimodality Frame.sln",
    "config.json",
    "scenes/MainScene.tscn",
    "scenes/demo.tscn",
    "scenes/controller_demo.tscn",
    "scripts/MultimodalFramework/MultimodalController.cs",
    "scripts/MultimodalFramework/LLMClient.cs",
    "scripts/MultimodalFramework/OnlineASRClient.cs",
    "scripts/MultimodalFramework/VoiceRecorder.cs",
    "scripts/MultimodalFramework/FrameworkConfig.cs",
    "scripts/MultimodalFramework/IOption.cs",
    "scripts/MultimodalFramework/BaseOption.cs",
    "scripts/MultimodalFramework/OptionRegistry.cs",
    "scripts/Dialog/StoryManager.cs",
    "scripts/Dialog/StoryNode.cs",
    "scripts/Dialog/StoryNodeContent.cs",
    "scripts/Camera/CameraController.cs",
    "scripts/UI/StoryNodeUIController.cs",
    "scripts/UI/UIPositionController.cs",
    "scripts/Demo/DemoScene.cs",
    "scripts/Demo/ControllerDemo.cs",
    "dialogs/introduce.dialogue",
    "story/Introduce.tres",
    "addons/dialogue_manager/plugin.gd"
  ]
}
```

### 项目结构概览

```
multimodality-frame/
├── project.godot                    # Godot 项目配置 (4.6, C#, Forward Plus)
├── Multimodality Frame.csproj       # .NET 8.0 项目文件 (Godot.NET.Sdk 4.6.1)
├── Multimodality Frame.sln          # Visual Studio 解决方案
├── config.json / config.example.json # 运行时配置
├── scenes/                          # Godot 场景文件 (.tscn)
│   ├── MainScene.tscn               # 主场景 (main_scene)
│   ├── demo.tscn
│   └── controller_demo.tscn
├── scripts/                         # C# 脚本 (核心业务逻辑)
│   ├── MultimodalFramework/         # 多模态框架核心
│   │   ├── MultimodalController.cs  # 多模态控制器
│   │   ├── LLMClient.cs             # LLM 大语言模型客户端
│   │   ├── OnlineASRClient.cs       # 在线语音识别客户端
│   │   ├── VoiceRecorder.cs         # 语音录制
│   │   ├── FrameworkConfig.cs       # 框架配置
│   │   ├── IOption.cs / BaseOption.cs / OptionRegistry.cs  # 选项系统
│   ├── Dialog/                      # 对话/故事系统
│   │   ├── StoryManager.cs          # 故事管理器 (Autoload)
│   │   ├── StoryNode.cs
│   │   └── StoryNodeContent.cs
│   ├── Camera/CameraController.cs   # 相机控制
│   ├── UI/                          # UI 控制
│   └── Demo/                        # 演示场景脚本
├── dialogs/                         # 对话资源文件
│   └── introduce.dialogue
├── story/                           # 故事资源
│   └── Introduce.tres
├── prefebs/UI/                      # UI 预制件
├── addons/dialogue_manager/         # Dialogue Manager 插件 (第三方)
└── .godot/                          # Godot 编辑器缓存
```

### 关键技术特征

| 维度 | 详情 |
|------|------|
| **引擎** | Godot 4.6，Forward Plus 渲染器 |
| **主语言** | C# (net8.0)，SDK: `Godot.NET.Sdk/4.6.1` |
| **分辨率** | 1920×1080，VSync 自适应 |
| **插件** | Dialogue Manager（支持 .NET/C# 模式） |
| **Autoload** | `DialogueManager`、`StoryManager` |
| **核心能力** | LLM 集成、在线 ASR 语音识别、语音录制、多模态交互控制 |

这是一个基于 Godot 引擎的**多模态交互框架**项目，集成了大语言模型 (LLM)、语音识别 (ASR)、对话系统等能力。
